name: Apple Cinnamon Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and core apples, then thinly slice them.
2. Beat together the first five ingredients until blended.
3. Gradually beat in the remaining ingredients until well combined.
4. Place batter in a lightly oiled 10-inch springform pan and arrange apples decoratively on top.
5. Sprinkle cinnamon sugar over the top of the cake.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for about 35 to 40 minutes, or until a cake tester inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the cake to cool in the pan before removing it.
8. Dust with 1 teaspoon sifted powdered sugar before serving.
Serves 12 (About 149 calories per serving)
